entities.description: b2b     refers to the pin numbering system for the b2b connector on the core board  indicating which pins are used internally and which are connected to the b2b connector
pmic        refers to the power management chip connected to the i2c0 and i2c1 interfaces on the core board
i2c0 refers to one of the i2c bus interfaces on the core board  which is connected to the pmic power management chip
i2c1 refers to another i2c bus interface on the core board  which is connected to the pmic power management chip

relations.description: b2b     are part of the core board s design  indicating which pins are used internally and which are connected to the b2b connector
i2c0 is connected to the pmic power management chip  which is part of the core board s design
i2c1 is connected to the pmic power management chip  which is part of the core board s design
i2c0 is one of the i2c buses that should be avoided in the base board design for system stability
i2c1 is another i2c bus that should be avoided in the base board design for system stability
